title: Telangana To Get Intense Thunderstorms Today After 42°C Heat Wave - Telangana Tribune

full_text:
Telangana residents are advised to prepare for intense thunderstorms expected to sweep across several districts today, April 19, 2026. The weather alert comes after most parts of the state experience extreme heat conditions with temperatures soaring between 42 to 45 degrees Celsius until afternoon hours. The sudden weather shift is expected to bring powerful storms during the afternoon and continue through the night across multiple regions.
The districts likely to be affected by these intense thunderstorms include Sangareddy, Vikarabad, Rangareddy, Medak, Kamareddy, Nirmal, Nizamabad, Sircilla, Siddipet, Jagitial, Mancherial, and Asifabad. Weather authorities have issued warnings for these areas, with storm activity expected to begin during afternoon hours and persist into the night. Residents in these districts are urged to stay alert and take necessary precautions as the storms approach.
The state capital Hyderabad is also on alert for scattered intense thunderstorms during evening to night hours. The city is expected to witness temperatures reaching 41 to 42 degrees Celsius during the day before the weather system brings relief through storm activity. Citizens are advised to plan their outdoor activities accordingly and stay indoors during the storm period.
The dramatic weather transition from extreme heat to intense storms is a typical pattern during the pre-monsoon season in Telangana. Such weather conditions can bring strong winds, lightning, and heavy rainfall in short bursts. Local authorities have been alerted to remain prepared for any emergency situations that may arise due to the severe weather conditions expected across the state.
